title: Full website redesign for Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio

requirements.text: Redesign the overall visual theme of the portfolio website with a bold, artisanal aesthetic that reflects the identity of a mural artist. Use a rich, warm color palette (deep earthy tones, terracotta, warm cream, charcoal) with strong typography contrasts. Apply the theme consistently across all sections: Navigation, HeroSection, AboutSection, ServicesSection, FeaturedProjects, ArtworkGallery, WhyChooseSection, ContactSection, QRSection, and Footer.
acceptanceCriteria: A unified visual theme is applied consistently across all page sections
Color palette uses warm, earthy, artisanal tones (no generic blue/grey corporate look)
Typography is bold and expressive with clear hierarchy between headings and body text
No section feels visually disconnected or inconsistent with the rest

requirements.text: Redesign the Navigation component with a visually refined layout: improved logo presentation, cleaner link styling, refined mobile menu, and a high-contrast 'Hire Me' CTA button that matches the new theme. Preserve existing functionality (scroll-aware styling, double-tap easter egg to admin login, WhatsApp link).
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation is visually polished and matches the new design theme
Mobile menu is clean and functional
WhatsApp 'Hire Me' CTA button is prominent and styled consistently
Double-tap logo easter egg still navigates to admin login

requirements.text: Redesign the HeroSection with a full-screen, immersive layout: large dramatic typography for the artist name and tagline, refined CTA button styling, and a well-composed overlay on the background cover image. Preserve existing dynamic content fetching from the backend CMS.
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is visually striking and full-screen
Artist name and tagline are displayed with large, dramatic typography
CTA buttons (WhatsApp and Gallery) are styled consistently with the new theme
Background cover image with overlay is well-composed

requirements.text: Redesign the AboutSection with an improved two-column layout featuring the artist portrait, bio text, floating experience badge, and stats row. Enhance decorative accents to align with the new artisanal theme. Preserve all existing static content.
acceptanceCriteria: About section layout is clean and well-proportioned
Portrait image is prominently displayed with tasteful decorative treatment
Stats row (years active, projects done, client satisfaction) is clearly presented
Section matches the overall new visual theme

requirements.text: Redesign the ServicesSection with improved card layouts for the seven service offerings. Cards should have refined styling (borders, shadows, icon treatment, hover effects) consistent with the new theme. Preserve all existing service data.
acceptanceCriteria: Service cards are visually polished with consistent spacing and hover effects
All seven services are displayed correctly
Card style matches the new overall design theme

requirements.text: Redesign the FeaturedProjects and ProjectSection components with a more visually impactful layout. Improve the image/text split presentation, numbered overlay badge styling, and section heading. Preserve existing project data and alternating layout direction logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Featured projects section has a striking, editorial-style layout
Numbered badges are stylistically on-brand
Image and text areas are well-balanced
All five projects render correctly

requirements.text: Redesign the ArtworkGallery section with an improved grid layout, refined card hover effects, and a polished lightbox dialog. Preserve existing backend data fetching and Uint8Array-to-object-URL conversion logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Gallery grid is visually clean and responsive
Hover effects on artwork cards are elegant and on-brand
Lightbox dialog is well-styled and functional
Backend data fetching is preserved

requirements.text: Redesign the WhyChooseSection with improved card styling for the six trust-point cards. Enhance numbered accents, card layout, and section heading to match the new artisanal theme. Preserve all existing content.
acceptanceCriteria: Trust cards are visually refined and consistent with the new theme
Numbered accents are styled on-brand
All six trust points are displayed correctly

requirements.text: Redesign the ContactSection with improved card layouts for Location, WhatsApp, and Instagram contact cards. Apply refined iconography, card styling, and section heading consistent with the new theme. Preserve existing dynamic contact detail fetching and fallback defaults.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact cards are visually polished and clearly legible
Icons and labels are styled on-brand
Dynamic contact data from backend is still used with proper fallbacks

requirements.text: Redesign the Footer with a refined layout covering brand info, quick nav links, and contact details. Improve typography, spacing, and visual hierarchy to match the new theme. Preserve existing double-tap logo easter egg and WhatsApp/Instagram links.
acceptanceCriteria: Footer is well-structured and visually consistent with the new theme
Brand info, nav links, and contact details are clearly organized
Double-tap logo easter egg to admin login is preserved

requirements.text: Update the global CSS (frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css) and Tailwind configuration (frontend/tailwind.config.js) to reflect the new design system: revised color tokens, font choices, and spacing/shadow utilities aligned with the artisanal mural artist theme.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS custom properties and Tailwind config reflect the new color palette and design tokens
All components consume the updated design tokens consistently
No leftover conflicting styles from the previous design remain

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing backend data-fetching logic in every component — only visual/layout changes are in scope
Preserve the double-tap logo easter egg navigation to admin login in both Navigation and Footer
Preserve the WhatsApp pre-filled inquiry message already implemented across Navigation, HeroSection, ContactSection, and Footer
Do not change the backend (main.mo) in any way
nonGoals: Adding new sections or features not already present in the site
Changing the Admin Panel design or functionality
Modifying backend data models or Motoko logic
Adding new animations or interactive features beyond refined hover/transition effects
Changing the routing or URL structure
